titleStmt.title: SII 8.68: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 68. (A.R. No. 479 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyuñ cīrtanic celvi yun=ta ṉ perun=te viyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyal lūḻiyil liṭaituṟaiñāṭu n tuṭarThe words vaṉavelip paṭar have been omitted.vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum perukaṭal liḻattaraicar tammuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyar roṅkeḻilmuṭiyu muṉnavarpakkal teṉnavar vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyu min=ti ranāramum teṉṟicai Iḻa(ḻa)maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅ kāvaṟ pal paḻan=ti vum ceruviṟ cinavil Irupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti yiruttiya cempoṟ riruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅka ṉaḷapperum puka(ḻ)ḻoṭum piṭiyal yiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakkoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaipaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkīrtti Ātiñakaravaiyiṟ can=ti ran ṟolkulat tin=ti rarataṉai viṉaiyamar kkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟai kulataṉak kuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurarcer nalkkocalaināṭu n=ta ṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭapputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟat tākkit tikkaṉai kirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=ta can=ta n māviḻin=to ṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaḻal caṅkoṭṭal ma hivāḷaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvattaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal liyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅkarāmavicaiyottuṅkapaṉmanākiya kiṭārattaraicaṉai vākayamporukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭumakappaṭut turimaiyil piṟakkiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavan naka(r)nakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉaimatip puṉavamum kaṉamaṇik katavamum niṟai cirvicaiyamu ṇuṟainīrppaṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyū(r)raiyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipunal māppappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippattūṟuṭai
ti(r)tamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum k(ā)lāmutir kaṭun=ti ṟal lilāmulitecamum tenakkalarpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaḻaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanma rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḻade vaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7Āvatu maturān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭakarait tiruvaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār tevakanmi kaḷukkut tiruvaṇṇāmalai viyāpāri vayiri Arayaṉum Aṭaikkalavaṉ paṭiyaṉum vikkiramātittaṉ marutamāṇikkamum koyil tiruvāliyum cāttaṉ Aṭaikkalamum kāvaṉ kuṭṭeṟaṉum mātevaṉ viḷakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa nakarattom Oṭṭik kaittiṭ ṭiṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu tiruvaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār tevatāṉam Iṉṉāṭṭu muḷḷūr yāṇṭu 27Āvatu mutal Ūr Aṭaṅkalum Eṅkaḷ Ūroṭum kūṭa kaḻikka koṇṭu Immuḷḷūrk kaḻaṉikku Iṉṉāṭṭu māttūr Eriyil vaṭatūmpāṟu nir pāccikkoṇṭu veṇṭum payirceytu Aṉupavittu Ivvūr taṉ kaṭamaiyum Ūrkkaḻañcu kumarakaccāṇamum taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭamum Uḷḷiṭṭa Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷukkumāka Ittevar Uttaramayaṉacaṅkiramattilum de kṣaṇamayaṉacaṅkiramattilum sa hasra kalaca māṭiyaruḷukaikkum perun=ti ruvamutu ceytaruḷukaikkum Āka Atikārikaḷ coḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻun tūrnāṭṭu Arin=ta va(ṉ)nallūr Uṭaiyār nīlaṉ veṇkāṭaṉārāṉa rājarājamuven=ta veḷār ceyta nivan=ta ppaṭi poṉ muppattiru kaḻañcum Ittevar paṇṭārattukkallāl tuḷaiyoṭum Uraiyokkum poṉṉey Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum can=ti rātittaval tevar paṇṭārattey vaippatākavum Ipparicu kal veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvārkaḷākavum Icain tu kaittiṭṭiṭṭukkuṭuttom tevakanmi kaḷukkut tiruvaṇṇāmalai viyāpāri vayiri Arayaṉum Aṭaikkalavaṉ paṭiyaṉum vikkiramātittaṉ marutamāṇikkamum koyil tiruvāliyum cātta ṉaṭaikkalamum kāvaṉ kuṭṭeṟaṉum māteva ḷiṭṭa nakarattom . Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutiṉeṉ cirutaṉattup puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷattuk kaṇakku coḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭuk kuḻalūr Uṭaiyāṉ mavilai Ākkāṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ ṉeḻuttu . Ipparicu Icain tu kaittiṭṭuk kuṭuttamaikku Ivvūr viyāpāri Aṭaikkalavaṉ paṭiyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu . Ipparicu Icain tu kaittiṭṭuk kuṭuttamai
Ippaṭi yāṇṭu 2 10 7- Avatu ḷ 1[2 10 8]- ṉāl kalveṭṭiyatu . ḷ- 1 ṉāl Atikārikaḷ rājarājamuven=ta veḷār maturān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇaivaṭakarait tiruvaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyār koyiliṉuḷḷāl Ōlakkakūṭattiṉ muṉpirun tu kaṇakku keṭṭu Ittevar tevatāṉam kiḻaṇṇāttu nilattil Ātippuliyūruṭaiyāṉ kovaṉāccaṉāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa Aṇimurināṭāḻvāṉ kalluvitta Amarttikaṇṭappererikkiḻ nilattil yāṇṭu 2 10 7Āvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupattoṉpatumutal tiruttalām nilattil Ittevarkku śrīkāryañceyvāṉ Oruvaṉukku nāl Oṉṟiṉukku nellu tūṇippatakkāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatiṉukku nellu nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalattukku nila muveliyum Ittevarkku muṉpu kaṇakkeḻuti varuvāṉ Oruvaṉukku meleṟṟam kaṇakkeḻutuvāṉ Oruvaṉukku nellup patakkāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatiṉukku nellu Aṟupatiṉ kalattukku nilam veliyum Āka Iṉnila nālveliyum nikki niṉṟa nilattil yāṇṭu Irupatteḻāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupatteṭṭuvarai nilam kāṭu veṭṭit tiruttip payirceyta nilattālum Iṉṉāḷ mutal tiruttip payirceyyum nilattālum Umaytāsarikkut teṟkuppaṭṭa kollainilattil payirceyta nilattālum payirceyyum nilattālum Avvav Āṇṭukaḷ ceyta pokaṅkaḷil svā mipokattāl van=ta nellum poṉṉuṅ koṇṭu kārttikait tirunāḷilum paṅkuṉit tirunāḷilum tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭaiyāraic cevikka van=ta civacokikaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṭiyārai Ūṭṭuka veṉṟum puṟattaṭiyārkku koṟṟaṭṭuka veṉṟum Ittevar tevatāṉam vāmaṉpūṇṭiyāṉa puliyūrnāṭiccaruppetimaṅkalattuc cavaiyār kaṭava Ūrkkaḻañcāluṅ kumarakaccāṇattāluṅ kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum nāvaṟpūṇṭiyāṉa vayiramekaccaruppetimaṅkalattuc cavaiyār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum kiḻaṇṇāttūrār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum tiruvaṇṇāmalai nakarattār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum vaicca pūṇṭiūrār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum pūṇṭi Ūrār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ Irukaḻañcum paṅkaḷanāṭṭuk kuṇṭur murukaṭiccaruppetimaṅkalattuc capaiyār meṟpaṭi kaṭava poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum Ākak kaṭava poṉ Irupattaṟu kaḻañcum Ittevar paṇṭārattukkallāl tuḷaiyoṭu Uraiyokkum poṉne Ittevar paṇṭārattukku Uṭalākat taṇṭi Ippoṉṉāl Ittevar koyilile
viḷak koṉṟiṉukku ney yuriyāka nāḷoṉṟiṉukku naṟuney nāḻiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟ ṟaṟupatiṉukku ney muṉṉūṟ ṟaṟupati ṉāḻiyiṉāl poṉ kaḻañciṉukku ney Aṟupati ṉāḻiyāka poṉ Aṟukaḻañcum viḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku kaṟpūram mañcāṭiāka viḷakku Iraṇṭiṉukku Orunāḷaikku kaṟpūram Iraṇṭumañcāṭiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatiṉukku kaṟpūram muppattaṟu kaḻañcum Uṭaiyār tirumeyppūccukku Orunāḷ sandhi nāliṉukku kaṟpūram nālumañcāṭiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟ ṟaṟupatiṉukku kaṟpūram Eḻupattiru kaḻañcum Āka kaṟpūram nūṟ ṟeṇkaḻañciṉāl poṉ kaḻañcukku kaṟpūram Aṟukaḻañcākap poṉ patineṇ kaḻañcumāka kaḻañcum nikkip poṉ Irukaḻañcum paṇṭārattukku mutalākavumāka Ippaṭi [nivan=ta] mākak koṇṭu Iṭṭapaṭi cantirātittavaṟ ceykaveṉṟum Ippaṭi ceyvataṟkuk kalveṭṭuka veṉṟum Atikārikaḷ coḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu Arin=ta manallūruṭaiyāṉ nilaṉ veṇkāṭaṉāṉa rājarāja muventaveḷār Ipparicu ceyvitāka kal veṭṭuvittom tevarkaṉmikaḷom .
Digital edition of SII 8.68 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
